tasks.subject: Task 1: Create sandbox.conf and justfile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Produce a working justfile with all six sandbox recipes and a sandbox.conf with the default allow list.

**Files:**
- Create: `sandbox.conf`
- Create: `justfile`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `just --list` shows all six recipes without errors
- [ ] `sandbox.conf` contains the nova project path and a comment header
- [ ] `justfile` compiles cleanly (no syntax errors)

**Verify:** `just --list` → lists pull, build, start, stop, logs, sandbox

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sandbox.conf", "justfile"], "verifyCommand": "just --list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["just --list shows all six recipes", "sandbox.conf contains nova project path", "No justfile syntax errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Smoke test — verify image and interactive sandbox
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the official image pulls and that just sandbox correctly launches an interactive Claude Code session with the expected mounts.

**Files:** (none created — verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `just pull` completes without error
- [ ] `claude --version` runs inside container
- [ ] `~/.claude` is visible at `/root/.claude` inside container
- [ ] `/workspace/nova` is visible inside container
- [ ] Container exits cleanly after session ends

**Verify:** `docker run --rm ghcr.io/anthropics/claude-code:latest claude --version` → prints version string

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "docker run --rm ghcr.io/anthropics/claude-code:latest claude --version", "acceptanceCriteria": ["just pull succeeds", "claude --version runs in container", "mounts are correct", "just sandbox launches interactive session"]}
```
